Simple Process

Renting takes less than
5 minutes — here's how

From reservation to ignition, everything happens on your phone. No paperwork. No waiting in line. No office visit required.

1

Choose Your Car & Zone

Browse our available vehicles and select the New Jersey pickup zone closest to you. Each car has an exact GPS pin you'll receive after booking.

2

Book & Pay Securely

Submit your valid NJ or out-of-state driver's license, select rental dates, and pay with a card. Booking is confirmed instantly by email and SMS.

3

Unlock with Your Phone

Walk to the vehicle at pickup time. Complete the check-in process to unlock the car. Keys are inside.

4

Return & Lock Up

Drive back to the pickup zone, leave the key inside the car, and text our team to confirm drop off. Done — no drop-off desk needed.

Questions Answered

Frequently asked questions

We know contactless feels new. Here's everything you might be wondering before you book.

Yes, we are a fully registered business in the State of New Jersey. We're licensed by the NJ Motor Vehicle Commission and we operate virtually — our team works remotely across NJ — which is how we keep costs lower than traditional agencies.
Our support team is available 24/7 by phone and text. If there's any issue with the lockbox, GPS location, or the vehicle, we will troubleshoot with you in real time or arrange an alternative within 1 hour. In the rare event we cannot resolve the issue, you receive a full refund — no questions asked.
You need a valid driver's license (NJ or out-of-state), be at least 21 years old, and a credit or debit card. International licenses are accepted when accompanied by a passport. No additional hidden fees for license verification.
If damage occurs during your rental, report it to our team immediately and we will work with you to resolve it as quickly as possible. REMEMBER: never admit fault and speak with our team first by contacting us immediately!
Absolutely. Extensions can be requested via SMS as long as the car hasn't been booked by another renter. We try to be as flexible as possible — just communicate with us.
We process all payments securely through Stripe, a PCI-DSS Level 1 certified payment processor (the same used by Amazon, Google, and Uber). We never store your full card number. A refundable security deposit is held at time of booking and released 10 business days after return.

Privacy Terms
Our Story

We built XLane Rentals because renting a car shouldn't be a headache.

Traditional rental companies make you drive to an airport or mall, wait in line, sign stacks of paper, and argue over inspection scratches. We thought: there's a better way.

XLane Rentals was founded in 2022 by a group of NJ residents who were tired of the rental runaround. Today we operate 40+ vehicles across 6 zones in New Jersey — all managed remotely, all accessible contactlessly.

2022
Year Founded
40+
Vehicles in Service
1,200+
Completed Rentals
4.9★

What We Stand For

Built on three simple principles

🤝

Radical Transparency

The price you see is the price you pay. No resort fees, no "young driver" gotchas, no surprise charges. Our business registration and vehicle histories are available on request — always.

📍

Truly Local

Our vehicles live in the communities we serve. When you rent from XLane Rentals, you're picking up from a real neighborhood in NJ — not schlepping to a remote airport lot. We're where you are.

📞

Real Humans on Standby

No chatbots. Our team is reachable by text, call, or email around the clock. If something goes wrong — or even if something just feels unclear — a real person answers within minutes.

We're a real New Jersey business — here's the proof

We know that a company without a physical storefront can feel unfamiliar. That's fair. Here's what makes XLane Rentals legitimate and trustworthy:

XLane Rentals is registered with the New Jersey Division of Revenue and Enterprise Services. Our vehicles are registered and maintained to NJ DMV standards. Each car undergoes safety inspections every 6 months.

Our contactless model isn't a workaround — it's the point. By eliminating expensive office leases and large parking lots, we pass those savings directly to renters. It's the same reason you trust Airbnb hosts over hotels for certain trips.

Ready to rent from people you can trust?

Join over 1,200 New Jersey renters who've made the switch.

Privacy Terms

How Contactless Rentals Work

No office. No waiting. No key exchange. Here's exactly what to expect from start to finish.

The Process

Simple. Seamless. Contactless.

Whether your vehicle is parked on a neighborhood street or in a garage, the experience is the same — fast, clear, and fully guided.

01
📱

Reserve Online in Minutes

Choose your vehicle, select your pickup zone, enter your dates, and submit your driver's license. Booking is confirmed in minutes — no phone calls, no paperwork.

02
📍

Receive Your Pickup Instructions

After booking, you'll receive a confirmation with your exact pickup instructions. These vary by vehicle location:

🛣️
Street Parking

You'll receive a GPS pin dropping you to the exact street location of the vehicle within the neighborhood. Simply walk or drive to the pin.

🅿️
Parking Lot or Garage

You'll receive the facility name, address, and your exact parking spot number so you can go directly to the vehicle without searching.

03
✅

Complete Check-In & Access the Vehicle

When you arrive at the vehicle, follow the check-in steps sent to you. This typically includes verifying your identity and completing a quick pre-rental inspection photo. Once complete, you'll be able to access the vehicle. Keys are inside — you're ready to drive.

04
🚗

Drive — You're All Set

Enjoy your rental. If you have any questions during your rental period, our support team is available to assist you. Extensions can be requested via SMS before your scheduled return time.

05
🔁

Return the Vehicle

Drive back to the same pickup location. Leave the key inside the vehicle, and text our team to confirm your drop-off. That's it — no drop-off desk, no waiting, no hassle.

Good to Know

Common questions about pickup

🔍

What if I can't find the car?

Contact our team immediately by phone or text. We'll troubleshoot with you in real time and guide you directly to the vehicle.

🕐

What if I'm running late to pickup?

Just text us. We'll do our best to accommodate. If another renter is scheduled after you, we may need to adjust, but we always communicate.

📸

Do I need to photograph the car?

Yes — you'll take pre-rental photos as part of check-in. This protects you by documenting the vehicle's condition before your trip starts.

⛽

What about fuel?

Vehicles are provided with fuel. Please return the vehicle with at least the same fuel level as when you received it.

Ready to experience it yourself?

The whole process takes less than 5 minutes to book.

Privacy Terms
🔴 Support Available 24/7

Need Help During Your Rental?

XLane Rentals provides support for active renters before, during, and after their reservation. If you need immediate assistance, contact our support team.

📞 Call Now: (929) 752-4123 💬 Text Now: (929) 752-4123 ✉️ Email Support
Support Categories

How can we help you?

🚨

Immediate Assistance

If you are currently in an active rental and need help, contact XLane Rentals as soon as possible. Our support team can assist with vehicle access, rental questions, extensions, returns, and urgent rental-related issues.

🔧

Vehicle Breakdown

If the vehicle becomes disabled or unsafe to drive:

  • Move to a safe location if possible.
  • Turn on hazard lights.
  • Do not continue driving if the vehicle may be unsafe.
  • Contact XLane Rentals immediately.
⚠️

Accident Reporting

If you are involved in an accident:

  • Make sure everyone is safe.
  • NEVER admit fault at the scene without speaking with our team.
  • Take as many photos as possible of all vehicles involved before they are moved, when safe to do so.
  • Photograph the other vehicle from multiple angles, including all visible damage.
  • Capture clear photos of the other vehicle's license plate, registration, VIN, and the driver's license and insurance ID card.
  • Take photos of the accident scene, road conditions, traffic signs, skid marks, and any other relevant details.
  • Notify XLane Rentals immediately.
Important: Even if you believe the accident was not your fault, thorough documentation is critical. Photos of the other vehicle, its license plate, and the other driver's information may be necessary to establish responsibility and pursue recovery from the at-fault party. Failure to obtain sufficient documentation may make it difficult to recover damages from the responsible party.
🔑

Lockout Assistance

If you are locked out of the vehicle or having trouble accessing the vehicle, contact our support team. We will guide you through the next steps based on your reservation and vehicle access method.

⏱️

Rental Extensions

Need more time? Contact XLane Rentals before your scheduled return time to request an extension. Extensions are subject to availability and must be approved before the rental period ends.

🔁

Vehicle Return Help

If you need help with return instructions, parking location, fuel level, or key placement, contact support before completing your return.

💳

Security Deposit Questions

Security deposits are refunded 10 business days after the vehicle is returned. Before a deposit is released, the rental is reviewed for any outstanding items such as damages, tolls, tickets, fuel charges, or other pending rental-related charges. Once the review is complete, any eligible refund will be processed to the original payment method.

Still need help?

Our team is standing by. Choose the fastest way to reach us.

📞 (929) 752-4123 💬 Text Us ✉️ admin@xlanerentals.com

Terms

Terms & Conditions

Please read these terms carefully before completing your reservation.

"Agreement" means all terms and conditions in the rental record and any additional documents you sign, or we provide at the time of rental. "Renter" means each person signing this Agreement, each Authorized Driver, and every person or organization to whom charges are billed. "We," "our" or "us" means XLane Rentals. "Authorized Driver" means (a) the Renter; (b) any additional driver listed in this Agreement; and (c) any other person defined as an "authorized driver" under applicable law. Each Authorized Driver must have a valid operator's license and be at least age 21. "Vehicle" means the automobile identified in this Agreement and all its tires, tools, accessories, equipment, keys and documents provided inside the vehicle at the time of rental.

1. Rental; Indemnity; Personal Property; Warranties

Only Authorized Drivers may use the Vehicle. We may repossess the Vehicle at your expense without notice if the Vehicle is abandoned or used in violation of law or this Agreement. If the Renter fails to return the vehicle by the scheduled return time and refuses to return the vehicle despite reasonable attempts by XLane to make contact, the vehicle may be considered unlawfully retained. XLane reserves the right to contact law enforcement and report the vehicle as stolen. You agree to indemnify, defend and hold us harmless from all judgments, claims, liability, costs and attorney fees resulting from this rental and your use of the Vehicle. We make no warranties, express, implied or apparent, regarding the Vehicle. In no event shall we be liable for any indirect, special or consequential damages.

2. Condition and Return of Vehicle

The Vehicle must be returned to the designated return location on the date and time noted in this Agreement and in the same condition received, except for ordinary wear. Our determination of condition is subject to a final inspection which may occur after drop off. If the Vehicle is returned after closing hours, Renter's responsibility for damages continues until final inspection. To extend the rental, Renter must contact us before the due-in date. Renter must return the Vehicle with at least the same amount of fuel as when rented.

3. Responsibility for Damage or Loss

Regardless of fault, you are responsible for all damage to, loss of, or theft of the Vehicle during the rental period. Your responsibility may include: (a) physical damage from collisions, weather, vandalism, road conditions, and acts of nature; (b) if the Vehicle is a total loss, the full fair retail market value less salvage; (c) if repairable, the cost of repair plus diminution of value; (d) Loss of Use, measured by multiplying the daily rental rate by the number of days from damage until repaired or replaced; (e) an administrative fee based on the damage.

Per-Panel Damage Assessment: XLane utilizes a standardized per-panel damage assessment. Any scratch, dent, crack, paint damage, or other physical damage affecting a distinct exterior panel (including doors, fenders, bumpers, quarter panels, hood, or trunk) will be assessed at a fixed rate of $475 per damaged panel. Multiple damaged panels are charged separately. XLane is not required to complete repairs prior to assessing or collecting damage charges.

A security deposit is required for every rental. The deposit may be applied toward damages, violations, loss of use, administrative fees, or any other costs. XLane is not obligated to provide receipts or proof of actual repair costs as a condition of retaining or applying the deposit. XLane's determination of damages and application of the security deposit shall be final and binding.

4. Prohibited Uses

The following uses constitute material breaches of this Agreement. The Vehicle shall not be used:

  • By anyone who is not an Authorized Driver, or by anyone whose driving license is suspended
  • By anyone under the influence of drugs or alcohol
  • By anyone who obtained the Vehicle by giving false, fraudulent or misleading information
  • In furtherance of any illegal purpose
  • To carry persons or property for hire
  • To push or tow anything
  • In any race, speed test or contest
  • To teach anyone to drive
  • To carry dangerous or hazardous items or illegal material
  • Outside the United States or Canada (unless specifically authorized)
  • On unpaved roads
  • To transport more persons than the Vehicle has seat belts
  • To transport children without approved child safety seats as required by law
  • When the odometer has been tampered with or disconnected
  • With inadequately secured cargo
  • While sending or reading electronic messages while operating the Vehicle
  • Smoking in the Vehicle is strictly prohibited
  • Traveling further than a 100-mile radius from the pickup location
  • Traveling an excessive number of miles in an abusive manner
ANY PROHIBITED USE VIOLATES THIS AGREEMENT AND SHALL VOID ALL COVERAGE AND ADD-ONS. In the event of any breach, all purchased or included protections (including unlimited mileage packages, coverage plans, and optional services) shall be deemed void. The Renter shall be fully responsible for all applicable charges as if no such add-ons had been purchased.

5. Authorized Use, Identity Verification & Restricted Individuals

5.1 Authorized Driver Requirement

The vehicle may only be operated by the individual who completed the reservation and was approved by XLane. No other person is permitted to operate the vehicle unless explicitly approved in writing by XLane prior to use.

5.2 Prohibition of Proxy or Third-Party Rentals

Renting a vehicle on behalf of another individual or allowing any unapproved person to operate the vehicle is strictly prohibited and constitutes a fraudulent booking and a material breach of this Agreement. XLane reserves the right to immediately cancel the reservation or terminate the rental without notice. The Renter agrees that:

  • The standard cancellation policy may be overridden in cases of fraud or misrepresentation
  • XLane may retain up to 100% of the rental payment and any associated fees
  • A violation fee of up to $300 may be applied
  • The security deposit may be retained or applied toward administrative, risk, or enforcement costs

5.3 Identity Verification at Pickup

All renters must complete identity verification at the time of pickup, including submission of a valid driver's license and a real-time selfie with the vehicle. Failure to complete verification may result in cancellation of the reservation without refund.

5.4 Ongoing Verification During Rental

XLane reserves the right to request additional identity verification at any time during the rental period. Failure to comply may result in immediate vehicle disablement, termination of the rental, and repossession.

5.5 Misrepresentation and Fraud

Providing false, misleading, or third-party information constitutes a material breach of this Agreement and may result in immediate termination and enforcement actions.

5.6 Associated or Restricted Individuals

Reservations may be denied or terminated if the renter is determined, at XLane's sole discretion, to be associated with any individual previously banned or restricted from renting, including shared address, contact information, payment method, or known personal/familial relationships.

5.7 Unauthorized Use and Liability

If the vehicle is operated by anyone other than the Authorized Driver, all protections, coverage options, and limitations of liability are immediately void. The renter assumes full financial responsibility for any and all damages, losses, violations, fees, or claims.

5.8 Enforcement and Vehicle Control

XLane vehicles may be equipped with tracking and remote access technology. By renting, the renter acknowledges that XLane may monitor vehicle location and usage, disable the vehicle in cases of non-compliance, and recover or repossess the vehicle without prior notice.

5.9 Violation Consequences

Any violation of this section may result in immediate termination of the rental agreement, remote disablement of the vehicle, repossession without prior notice, retention of all payments, application of all applicable fees, and reporting the vehicle as stolen if deemed necessary.

5.10 No Refund Policy for Violations

No refunds will be issued for any unused rental time if a violation of these terms occurs.

6. Coverage

If you purchase Coverage, subject to the terms of this Agreement, we will waive our right to hold you financially responsible for all or a portion of physical damage to the Vehicle as noted on the Rental Record, including charges such as loss of use and administrative fees.

7. Responsibility to Others; Handling Accidents/Incidents

You are responsible for all injury, damage, or loss you cause to yourself and others. We are not responsible for injury or damage you cause to others. You must: (a) report all damage and accidents to us and the police as soon as you discover them and are safe; (b) complete our incident report form; and (c) provide us with a copy of any service of process or notice related to an accident. Any failure to report damage or accidents shall constitute a material breach and may invalidate optional coverage. The Vehicle may not be taken into Mexico under any circumstances.

8. Payment; Charges

Cancellations are subject to a 20% cancellation fee based on the total rental amount. Security deposits will be refunded within 10 business days after the vehicle is returned, subject to inspection. All rates, fees, and security deposit amounts are subject to change upon review. Final pricing is determined after verification of renter eligibility, driving history, payment method, and risk assessment. XLane reserves the right to modify or decline any rate prior to vehicle release.

You will pay all Charges including: time charges; mileage charges; optional product and service fees; fuel and refueling fees if you return with less fuel than received; applicable taxes and surcharges; expenses incurred locating and recovering the Vehicle; a reasonable cleaning fee if returned substantially less clean; towing and storage charges; and all other costs resulting from your use of the Vehicle.

All reservations are subject to final approval by XLane after internal verification and risk assessment. Payment of a reservation does not guarantee approval. In the event a reservation is not approved, XLane reserves the right to cancel the booking. Refunds will be issued in accordance with the cancellation policy, and applicable fees may still apply.

9. Tolls, Traffic Violations, and Other Charges

A 20% administrative fee will be applied to all tickets and violations incurred during the rental period. A $5 processing fee will be charged for each toll incurred. You are responsible for paying all tolls and parking citations directly. An Outstanding Balance Fee of $35 applies if any outstanding toll balance remains unpaid prior to vehicle return. XLane reserves the right to immediately charge any outstanding balance to the payment method on file.

10. Personal Information; Communications

You agree that we may disclose personally identifiable information to applicable law enforcement agencies or third parties in connection with enforcement of our rights. By signing this Agreement, the Renter and any Authorized Driver expressly authorize XLane to verify the validity of their driver's license and to obtain and review driving history records, motor vehicle reports (MVR), background screening reports, and other eligibility verification information at any time before, during, or after the rental period.

11. Pickup Policy

For all vehicle pickups scheduled during physical business hours (7:00 AM to 7:00 PM), the Renter must upload both a valid driver's license and the same debit or credit card used to make the reservation via the QR Code at the facility to verify identity. The vehicle will not be handed over if either item is missing, expired, or does not match the reservation.

For vehicle pickups scheduled outside of business hours, the process will remain contactless. The Renter will receive detailed instructions for remote access to the vehicle prior to the scheduled pickup time. Failure to comply with this policy may result in cancellation of the reservation without a refund.

12. Miscellaneous

No term of this Agreement can be waived or modified except by a writing that we have signed. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between you and us. This Agreement will be governed by the substantive law of the jurisdiction where the rental commences. If any provision of this Agreement is deemed void or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain valid and enforceable.

YOU AND WE EACH IRREVOCABLY WAIVE ALL RIGHT TO TRIAL BY JURY IN ANY LEGAL PROCEEDING ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO THIS AGREEMENT OR THE TRANSACTIONS CONTEMPLATED UNDER THIS AGREEMENT.

Questions about these terms? Contact us before booking.

Contact XLane Rentals
